description: Pre-built message bubbles (sent/received), input bar with autoresize, typing indicator, avatars, and read-receipt patterns. Drop-in HTML + CSS + tiny JS helper. Lets the model build chat interfaces without inventing bubble geometry that breaks at long messages or hallucinating message-list scroll behavior.

messages-container.behavior: auto-scroll to bottom on new message

compose-bar.purpose: Input bar with autoresize textarea + send

license: Original CSS + JS patterns, ISC-equivalent. No third-party assets.
